name: me, MJ Hegar
subject: Senator Cornyn isn't taking COVID-19 seriously
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Again and again when Sen. Cornyn tweets about COVID-19, he makes light of it or downplays it.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6e9/3025276676/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6e8/3025276676/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200614.2nd__1555__&amount=10")
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6e8/3025276676/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200614.2nd__1555__&amount=10")**
As COVID-19 cases in Texas continue to rise with record numbers of hospitalizations due to lack of sufficient safety regulations as the state reopened, Sen. Cornyn isn't taking action to protect Texans. Peter, you know his record when it comes to tweeting about COVID-19. No matter how many COVID-19 patients had pre-existing conditions, they ALL deserve a senator who cares about their well-being.

Sen. Cornyn's comments are especially appalling since he's voted TWENTY TIMES to repeal the Affordable Care Act, repeatedly voted to gut pre-existing condition protections, and even now he's standing aside as a lawsuit threatens to rip away protections for people with pre-existing conditions!

**[Pitch in to help me beat Sen. Cornyn and give people with pre-existing conditions the protections they deserve.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6e8/3025276676/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200614.2nd__1555__&amount=10")**

**I know how important it is that everyone has quality, affordable health care, and I won 't allow millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions to lose their care. [If you can, donate today for a senator who will ALWAYS put your health care first.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6e8/3025276676/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200614.2nd__1555__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6e8/3025276676/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200614.2nd__1555__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6ef/3025276676/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1555&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cb/7f51f7bc/4e80ad12/4ef6e6ee/3025276676/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update 6.14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Today, as we commemorate the Army's 245th birthday, I hope you are with friends and family celebrating the freedoms and values that distinguish our great Nation. The singular virtues of our country cut through the temporary discord surrounding us and fuel campaigns like mine to build a brighter future for all Americans.

It has been a great week for Team Hunt. I kicked off the week with a visit to the Houston Distributing Company. The folks at Houston Distributing are working hard to secure opportunities for those living in our communities and are providing pathways through this challenging economic climate.

On Tuesday, I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Mayor Pro-Tem of Jersey Village, Bobby Warren. I look forward to the opportunity to work more with community leaders like Bobby to address the needs of the residents of TX-07.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=69ff692290ae413ab9782047a1282302&_e=24kjDZ3V9lMzTPs0t4wGMieZHu9KGqf4EWt38_vk26GLbLcuVqEuKnVFLXn5cXVzAS3Rf0FfUluyRP7-Xc8h2gdCyaTkrwCeH8TINxbFpmfDVR9a-fIqg_TjkZoZPGvHkVJxyg7zoFDLQEO59Vh-LSMRBVCrmKq6OpKuxf78cpPZMp4o7DDdC8v7Y75_UZS8-Kie4EQNobL2Fh75sNuMXHBfhvSwRM58v8GHpOE382rj-lO_EUl8g0uz5waHq5Oo_yekXjPIuz-hxN-KIKqntTyx6f63Tcpx8ZMy29VvkG9C76H8Tcw2HJRzHbtWqZqV)

On Friday, I joined many Americans in proudly congratulating the West Point Class of 2020. I am honored to be a part of the legacy of service sustained by the latest class of West Point graduates. Our future is brighter because talented young men and women devote themselves to a purpose higher than themselves.

As always, thank you for your continued support. I look forward to continuing to work with you and to finding new ways to serve this community.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=69ff692290ae413ab9782047a1282302&_e=24kjDZ3V9lMzTPs0t4wGMtCBg1i8vUfOpFQY4OyQ77IIrXFSeouDB_hE3DY0fdlVWnk9xYfC9LlKZPyX7SgPnQFpQ0K4eNVJq9s2_xV_uGhjCwJkulSmzqY1m1j_HyQsRCWD_TI6y5hR1depmK4vRV68ZDwXVNz4VXqSGk4YwsaIkOC0mSAcbc79LAYTh42arsxSVaAQgoSAM8cXD2FJXBa0jJuN4i5n60wayY1sZwyHQwRW5rS7pqrH7paRJRFfHAqGSfKLpuANNd9F7e1d0wrz0-V5xLGiE-7ae9OsPv0%3D)****

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: COVID-19 - A Second Wave?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17870151/209540186/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmFkYWIxZi0wNWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMWNmn8oPlD720iA8vQff9nv2UjKk5JTmnZL3XhVYvA=&emci=c4b752fe-00af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=b6adab1f-05af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10438639) _Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.[**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17870152/209540187/1282705599?refcode=06162020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmFkYWIxZi0wNWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMWNmn8oPlD720iA8vQff9nv2UjKk5JTmnZL3XhVYvA=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, We're 9 days away from the end of a critical FEC reporting period. June is already our best fundraising month ever, but we have to build on that - not rest on it. **[Join the movement by pitching in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17870153/209540188/-1907457919?refcode=061520_line_top&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmFkYWIxZi0wNWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMWNmn8oPlD720iA8vQff9nv2UjKk5JTmnZL3XhVYvA=). ** Many states that started to reopen their economies in early May, including right here in Texas, are seeing spikes in new COVID-19 cases and hospitalizations. There have been many mistakes made in dealing with the pandemic. The root cause of all of them has been the choice by many leaders to treat it from day one as a political problem, not a public health issue. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17872286/209570243/1003843848?refcode=20200615_em_org_absenteeballot_all_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY2ODYwNS0xMWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7mi8fpeQXx97eQb3KZ47ZgnMKKEdm8RH_J8yhfhnPM=)

| Friends — Today, June 15, is the final day to request your absentee ballot. Here are a few things to know about requesting and casting your absentee ballot ahead of the Kentucky primary on June 23:
* You can request your ballot online at _**[GoVoteKY.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17872287/209570244/-738883490?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY2ODYwNS0xMWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7mi8fpeQXx97eQb3KZ47ZgnMKKEdm8RH_J8yhfhnPM=&emci=4cf68605-11af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=4df68605-11af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=15601662)**_ , or directly via your County Clerk.

* Your application for an absentee ballot must be submitted today.

* To find out if your ballot has been mailed, received, or accepted, you may contact your County Clerk’s office.

* Absentee ballots must be mailed back at the latest with a postmark of June 23rd, which is Election Day.

* For those unable to cast an absentee ballot by mail, there is limited in-person voting, both ahead of time and on Election Day; you should check with your County Clerk’s office to confirm availability and set up an appointment if possible.

And, as always, if you have any questions about voting safely in this election, our team has compiled this information and more on our website. Visit _**[www.joshhicksforcongress.com/vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17872288/209570245/853052213?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGY2ODYwNS0xMWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7mi8fpeQXx97eQb3KZ47ZgnMKKEdm8RH_J8yhfhnPM=&emci=4cf68605-11af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=4df68605-11af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=15601662)**_ for more information! Thank you for your support, Josh | |
* * *

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: If anyone can take on Chaim Deutsch, it’s us.
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/I21xE0yG11WA2YlBcTi4KK07mNhozpmsRVccf6kMlXk=/j-0Ggiqda_Z6lV8KQCUWjufgREVstGWrk1_r53FFDdw=)

Peter,

Primary Day is one week from tomorrow, and Rep. Clarke is getting desperate.

She knows that her corporate PACs are no match for our grassroots movement, and that we've got all of the momentum on our side heading into the election, especially following our recent endorsement from _The New York Times_. Her surrogates are using scare tactics and spreading false narratives that she's the only person who can take on Chaim Deutsch. Rep. Clarke is trying to draw support away from our bigger and bolder movement -- but it's not going to work. **[Will you rush in a contribution today so we can ensure that every voter knows the truth about which candidate is best positioned to defeat right-wing homophobe Chaim Deutsch?](https://act.myngp.com/el/I21xE0yG11WA2YlBcTi4KK07mNhozpmsRVccf6kMlXk=/GBoSJCAUO-lktzk519uoFvP7sLqE6xLMYOK_eLV_NTE=)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: ACTION: We must keep fighting to reopen.
body:
TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE
THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, JUNE 15TH @ 1 P.M. ET » [FB.COM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY3LTk0MmViNzY2Mzg5OTRlZDg4MmEzOTI5MDI5ZjEzMjgw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3BnL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHM_bWlkPTQyMTk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=LB9HfcvBqZ_Ml6mWo0xLZQ) OR [TPP.US/LIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY3LTk0MmViNzY2Mzg5OTRlZDg4MmEzOTI5MDI5ZjEzMjgw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZT9taWQ9NDIxOTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Uh6jIIOOqQbxWEnWRZLjiQ) | |
---
This week, we are still promoting the [Second Opinion Project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY3LTk0MmViNzY2Mzg5OTRlZDg4MmEzOTI5MDI5ZjEzMjgw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxOTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=h0wgVCc-TKP83_GLDTsBPw) as well as other efforts to oppose the CDC and those elected officials and bureaucrats who continue to push lockdowns and unworkable guidelines. And, despite the left-wing chaos that has engulfed our nation, we must keep focused on trying to reopen the country because the lockdowns and economic damage will only amplify and worsen the left-wing mobs and violence. While we must hold the left accountable and deal with their insurrection, we also know that Democrats would love nothing more than for us to be so distracted that we stop fighting for freedom and for reopening.

_Note about sharing links:_ We’ve heard from some of you that you are not on any social media and so you can’t share videos and petitions and other items. I just wanted to assure you that if you share links over email to your friends and family, it is just as effective and important as sharing on social media. We are going to make it easier for those of you who are only sharing over email to copy and paste the link into an email. Sometimes we will specifically need a social media post to be shared, and for those action items, if you do not do social media, you can simply copy and paste the link for those posts into an email. At the end of the day, we are just so thankful for whatever actions you are able to take. Thank you!
|
---
**SHARE THE SECOND OPINION PROJECT WEBSITE**
Continue to watch and share [the interviews with doctors](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY3LTk0MmViNzY2Mzg5OTRlZDg4MmEzOTI5MDI5ZjEzMjgw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxOTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRI3ZpZGVvcw&K=nQjy8OsRPdbzRMtm_H452g) from around the country, and share [the petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTY3LTk0MmViNzY2Mzg5OTRlZDg4MmEzOTI5MDI5ZjEzMjgw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxOTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRI3BldGl0aW9u&K=WeyCYyLaBqjfT0tZKCtBYg).

body:
Imagine if a candidate told you they wanted to fire every single police officer in your community. Someone ran for office saying they wanted to turn your neighborhood and your home completely over to criminals without consequence. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Standing together in unison
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IdeA_tV0xaNpZg6-uF0lhGN_8evjcaa_4-6_1eZGGs=/Hhetf8ThKgACTdpVKCBSMsYfGCGc4DESVduu38l1gsw=)

Peter,

Like so many folks across America, the last three weeks have been a wake up call for me. It is a reminder that so many continue to face discrimination, racism, hate and violence based on the color of their skin on a daily basis. And it's a reminder that historic inequities have led to systemic racism and injustice that still pervade so many corners of our lives.

Congress is taking action. Last week, we introduced a police reform bill that would ban chokeholds, prohibit no-knock warrants, create a national database to track misconduct among police officers, and more. Officers must be held accountable for their actions. This is an important start and will continue to address the systems in every parts of our lives that continue to prevent Black Americans and people of color from accessing the full and equal opportunity to which they are entitled.

We have a lot of work ahead of ourselves, but I know, together, we will see a much needed change in America. I stand against injustice, and with your help, we will enact long overdue reform. We can and must do better.

My heart goes out to all those hurting. I hear you and I support you.

In solidarity,

Mike Thompson

| _**To stay up to date with the latest news and safety tips on the coronavirus, please visit the _[CDC website](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IdeA_tV0xaNpZg6-uF0lhGN_8evjcaa_4-6_1eZGGs=/hB9GeFPbtAAkADVJjvo4uNrKRf4XrMiRDkumjE3lbgo=)_.** _
---

_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IdeA_tV0xaNpZg6-uF0lhGN_8evjcaa_4-6_1eZGGs=/Q6TwErhbOfHQ3cH61u9YGeQwg_FfCup-TxzzcvJx9s8=?amount=15&refcode=MT_EM_EN_200612_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

_We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IdeA_tV0xaNpZg6-uF0lhGN_8evjcaa_4-6_1eZGGs=/HYM2PbCpKf7tY03SOd_o7Nwh__rK7YIKRLere90VlhE=)_

Friend,

subject: Final Chance to RSVP

body:
|

Dear Friend, There is still time to RSVP for our event tonight with NYGOP State Chairman Nick Langworthy, _**and our VIP guest - Senior Advisor to the Trump 2020 Campaign - Kimberly Guilfoyle at 5:30 PM EST.**_ _**[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/7639n99x8928FnQBkv4eOrn7ag/VdewtU892sqVP3toV3Ys7IbQ)**_ _****_ With the election less than two weeks away, we are calling on all volunteers to help our campaign contact voters all across NY27 and tell them _**Chris Jacobs has our President 's full support and endorsement for the Primary and Special Election on June 23rd. **_ The elections on June 23rd are critical to ensuring that we get strong, conservative, and experienced leadership for Western New York in Congress, and **the President and I need your help.** Join us for an exciting night on Monday and reserve your chance to hear from both NYGOP State Chairman Nick Langworthy and _**Trump 2020 Senior Campaign Advisor Kimberly Guilfoyle!**_ This is all hands-on deck, and your support will make sure we bring in two big wins on June 23rd. _**Please RSVP by today at 2:00 PM EST**_. [You can RSVP online now by clicking here.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/vxLBZdw892il763zabQ78s0RIQ/VdewtU892sqVP3toV3Ys7IbQ) Whether you're an experienced campaigner or looking to get started, please join us! _**All are welcome and comprehensive training will be provided.**_ I look forward to seeing you tonight and thank you for your continued support!

Best,
Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/OkvgVVyc0x524PSpkTGqtA/VdewtU892sqVP3toV3Ys7IbQ) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/DnXblKKwR88c892z1Ve5aoOw/VdewtU892sqVP3toV3Ys7IbQ)

Today, we are rolling out our grassroots operation called, “Every Township Counts” for the general election. We are looking for your help to lead..... Today, we are rolling out our grassroots operation called, “Every Township Counts” for the general election. We are looking for your help to lead our team in your community!
We are building team with grassroots captains in every county, township, and precinct and that will include:
-Organizing volunteers for the phones, -Door to door canvassing (soon), -Passing out bumper stickers and yard signs, -Or just letting us know what is going on in your community!
Right now, we are starting by making phone calls to voters explaining why I am the right candidate for the Lehigh Valley. name: Team Eugene
subject: [Action Requested] Sign to protect the right to vote 🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
The right to vote is one of the most fundamental rights given to us by the Constitution. Yet what we saw in Georgia’s primary last week, long lines at limited polling places, inadequate voting infrastructure, and broken machines was plain and simple voter suppression.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17877489/209670450/460726911?refcode=em_pet_2020.06.15_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=d4138c77-35af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDEzOGM3Ny0zNWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzcMOCKnn9skHxLI1JegYPglUgc_STlG28FALTyRvTE=) Team,

**The right to vote is one of the most fundamental rights given to us by the Constitution.** Yet what we saw in Georgia’s primary last week -- long lines at limited polling places, inadequate voting infrastructure, and broken machines -- was plain and simple voter suppression.

In recent years, states across the country have unleashed a wave of voter suppression laws that seek to make it harder for people to engage in our democracy. **These laws specifically target people of color, the elderly, people with disabilities, and low-income communities.**

[**This can’t stand. We must ensure that every American has the opportunity to engage in our democratic system in a safe and secure way. Join us in calling on Congress to protect the right to vote >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17877490/209670451/332109943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDEzOGM3Ny0zNWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzcMOCKnn9skHxLI1JegYPglUgc_STlG28FALTyRvTE=&emci=b31dcae2-1aaf-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d4138c77-35af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249)
| [Protect voting rights »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17877491/209670452/332109943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDEzOGM3Ny0zNWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzcMOCKnn9skHxLI1JegYPglUgc_STlG28FALTyRvTE=&emci=b31dcae2-1aaf-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d4138c77-35af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249)
---

Voter suppression efforts are nothing more than an outright attack on our democracy, and we must fight to protect the ability of every American to make their voices heard, especially now.

Those we elect this year will be tasked with addressing systemic racism, rebuilding our economy, and managing how our country moves forward from a global pandemic among other things. We must eliminate barriers to voting so that every American can take part in _one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime._

clean_body: The right to vote is one of the most fundamental rights given to us by the Constitution. Yet what we saw in Georgia’s primary last week, long lines at limited polling places, inadequate voting infrastructure, and broken machines was plain and simple voter suppression. = Team, The right to vote is one of the most fundamental rights given to us by the Constitution. Yet what we saw in Georgia’s primary last week -- long lines at limited polling places, inadequate voting infrastructure, and broken machines -- was plain and simple voter suppression. In recent years, states across the country have unleashed a wave of voter suppression laws that seek to make it harder for people to engage in our democracy. These laws specifically target people of color, the elderly, people with disabilities, and low-income communities. | Voter suppression efforts are nothing more than an outright attack on our democracy, and we must fight to protect the ability of every American to make their voices heard, especially now. Those we elect this year will be tasked with addressing systemic racism, rebuilding our economy, and managing how our country moves forward from a global pandemic among other things. We must eliminate barriers to voting so that every American can take part in one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime. Thank you, Team Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. subject: Mondaire is a fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
In Congress, I’ve stood up to big banks trying to rip off working families. But I need more leaders in Congress who will join me in that fight and make sure we have an economy that works for everyone. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UID8yzxFqd9geXjcQQdfq4rr05X0y9xTaAdjHXK8nW8DCNmKhcSRDGg1TBxfguClaxPeCW3obB7EQWngMywJ1KpT6VkaBY9oIHYPwDa3NJlRVvH7eYzoYoDO0rn-ui9d_Mb9M8lw9m0j872fLTgPtOSg4Lw3wHDcbgHrMMJDsI9jwuOLYTff77VXuFfZREUqNc2MRe6ZBtglqp9bafUw_4AYuEMMPk_elNJNHI7S-c_N6L6eCkTAmv_29GoKUFkLejrYdMToqQZePXRgtBt5hWA/32n/eaCVPeWkS6SmZdoSaf4U4g/h0/TNzBMesn8j3r8bupKfTgXZRWQV-iI3oJV3dI7dJ5uzA) Friend,
In Congress, I’ve stood up to big banks trying to rip off working families. But I need more leaders in Congress who will join me in that fight and make sure we have an economy that works for everyone. That’s why I’m supporting Mondaire.
This race is a dead heat right now, and Mondaire needs our help. **_[Can you chip in today to help him win?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UID8yzxFqd9geXjcQQdfq4nbQSLJZ2O-IvZQB7wJp7jnLageq-L4xRKYjt0j8GI67BRDuuptjJvdmxEwmaeamOGuKHdXFWuPmGBRz1D2AEj3nKgJhq3OUK8qmxPeSt5MCt1uVFiOSAUkxeJnmSA1LLVAzIr63t46iVDaF638YnElVxCees07CV7dxMFuvuSMdW1ZKdKvCMfppznvGS218o8huqny6qsiiR4ZEElWPv53b8z7phdoGyXShfQ6WEcOmnmFp5vTMLph1e-9mmIg5Tg/32n/eaCVPeWkS6SmZdoSaf4U4g/h1/FmMbA6cOMvMopYuHWJqZWKWUHWngs5d0Ejix8mJXQkQ)_**
Mondaire fought against the odds of his upbringing. He was born to a single mom and grew up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, but battled his way into Stanford University, the Obama Administration, and Harvard Law School.
Today, he’s fighting for the people of his district on a bold, progressive platform: passing Medicare for All, ending Citizens United, enacting common sense gun safety measures, and economic relief for the middle class.
**_[Will you chip in today to help Mondaire fight alongside me in Congress?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UID8yzxFqd9geXjcQQdfq4pMViAQlRCa_r6rsxB2oGqq7xkV0Jrw-nwRqd7K9zyB0dcwkbxk9sg4mheJv1nY0t4mWc43kxAB0VHoHtRoArPnDrcGOTbLpZQajyEu1ey4twN5pVJ60YYt6SA2pxH9f2I2tGJgOEoPmpjFwfjhHywvf7A64dZFe65CdbtqK7nHc5ScHdKHfpcsohQTOy-rQWhgXOfG7YnNDp1MhEw-L-l-j63BX7X7-OT-C0O9eLjMgiIOFEnr1spxlYDKvpRY7yQ/32n/eaCVPeWkS6SmZdoSaf4U4g/h2/JJf_oBVzsC01lsIG0PoK_TdQMT-f_27AfZA0as3XJuA)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UID8yzxFqd9geXjcQQdfq4h6b2X8WDiI1f2lprcq0nFe7tng5NYx2T6RZCNU6p-RanPmLI7qZrUFwhP4wWUnwOTuIxhlvTqnbkWhynly1485oVh4bkxSyUOh0iMx1M8jiKEG8XcG5AEbQTFWg-ZD4P4KKbgt2sHNvcGHphj-R97cVlJ72sK0ylHLMObVDSblC7rJAlGYJMTULYckiF7ZmiNjoBkwWnK6i_lTYru2iG3AGlzZYfnCcN5NvBo63EgQbqV3OaLARlGx8jmwajqAvzA/32n/eaCVPeWkS6SmZdoSaf4U4g/h3/w2hiqJBLx3c19FNtEE--VE4wp9pv_8qo_pLdew1rzlg)
Mondaire is up against some deep-pocketed competition. One of his opponents is spending $4 million of his Big Pharma family fortune to buy the seat. Another has taken big money from the defense lobby, including former officials from the Reagan and Bush Administrations.
But Mondaire has stuck to his guns: he’s running with the support of grassroots donors like you, not corporate PACs.
**_[We have an incredible opportunity to elect a real progressive to this seat. Can you support him with a donation today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UID8yzxFqd9geXjcQQdfq4uwEvWqSoZxNJCaXSoYOMKne0swe9_ihqmpDAIN_HCNN2NSgEfSic8eEpQutU1uJPS9TvA5PjSEbRrZPFQTUJlNmcVVaA55aMNeHkSuQp8lBbsz_xyRY6YtDBUYH6-aPQvaS1GemplQk9SFeMPqmk5kTsdIsorWsHjO9gG7mT186wqdd87ryRjiK69lWk1pbtG6Gq02256L2jxjz5qcFqQvqc4fwvE3P1byysCyIahTQf7iSv5xsA1ncr0w20wJLRw/32n/eaCVPeWkS6SmZdoSaf4U4g/h4/WluWQQyY3YpQziaZBgAlbi0OStZx_d5PVZ1MZuJ77YQ)_**

But I need more leaders in Congress who will join me in that fight and make sure we have an economy that works for everyone. | | | Friend, In Congress, I’ve stood up to big banks trying to rip off working families. But I need more leaders in Congress who will join me in that fight and make sure we have an economy that works for everyone. That’s why I’m supporting Mondaire. This race is a dead heat right now, and Mondaire needs our help. Mondaire fought against the odds of his upbringing. He was born to a single mom and grew up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, but battled his way into Stanford University, the Obama Administration, and Harvard Law School. Today, he’s fighting for the people of his district on a bold, progressive platform: passing Medicare for All, ending Citizens United, enacting common sense gun safety measures, and economic relief for the middle class. Mondaire is up against some deep-pocketed competition. One of his opponents is spending $4 million of his Big Pharma family fortune to buy the seat. Another has taken big money from the defense lobby, including former officials from the Reagan and Bush Administrations. But Mondaire has stuck to his guns: he’s running with the support of grassroots donors like you, not corporate PACs. Thank you, Katie Porter | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . Peter,
I’m going to be as simple and direct as possible. In 2018, the TNDP built the most comprehensive voter protection program Tennessee had ever seen. Now, we need your help funding our 2020 Voter Protection program. Here’s a breakdown of where we stand right now:
Total Cost: $59,800
Raised so far: $14,741
We need to raise another $45,059
From reactivating and growing our volunteer network, to monitoring state and county election commissions, to recruiting poll watchers and staffing boiler room operations – this program covers ALL of the line items we need. This is how we ensure that every Democrat gets to vote, do it safely, and have their voice heard. This is how we beat the GOP.
We can’t wait until November to fund voter protection. Costs are already piling up and now is the time to lean in. Will you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17878571/209692680/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmFkNGYyYy0zZWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-jbkLAlOZ8F-k_Y20gSexoC1MK-g6I_KjxfkheF8k=&emci=5ee36d75-34af-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=66ad4f2c-3eaf-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

Friend,

We’re coming up on an important mid-month benchmark -- **and we won’t be able to meet it without your support.**

Our Finance Director reached out to you yesterday to explain why that deadline is so important: it keeps us on track for the end of the month, gives us a boost before our important FEC filing deadline, and shows our opponents that the momentum is on our side.

**We’re not interested in soliciting attention by being extreme or divisive. And we’re not interested in selling this district to big corporations for PAC money.**

**We’re building a campaign based on the issues families in TX-22 care about, so we can be held accountable to those families -- not anyone else.**

That’s why we need to meet our goals as we approach our FEC fundraising deadline, friend-- we need to ensure that we can power this grassroots campaign to Election Day and **win**.

[**So, if you’re able, can you chip in $15 or whatever you can to ensure our movement keeps growing?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17878574/209692683/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.15_GST_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmFkNGYyYy0zZWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7-jbkLAlOZ8F-k_Y20gSexoC1MK-g6I_KjxfkheF8k=)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Dems to Defund Police
body:
Democrats, including my radical opponent Lois Frankel, are pushing the “Justice in Policing Act.”
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043548-fb379555fc-5734f9eccb)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb) Democrats, including my radical opponent Lois Frankel, are pushing the “Justice in Policing Act.”

While the legislation has some great reforms such as ending mistake-prone No-Knock raids and ending deadly chokeholds, **it contains one intentional and MASSIVE fatal flaw**.

**The legislation is designed to defund and dismantle local law enforcement.**
Police now have “limited immunity” that protects officers, police departments and entire towns from a constant flow of lawsuits.

The Democrats’ legislation eliminates limited immunity for law enforcement . . . and they know that will bankrupt police agencies around the nation.

Without that limited immunity, your local police will be inundated with lawsuits – **and you can bet that most of those suits will come from leftist groups funded by George Soros**.

If the Left is successful in defunding the police, you will no longer be able to call 911 . . . because there will be nobody there to answer and respond to your emergency calls.

**My opponent, Lois Frankel, is a co-sponsor of this bill.[Help me remove her today by supporting my campaign.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb)**

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb)

**What is the ultimate goal of Democrats with this bill?**
It’s not to get rid of the police . . . **it’s to follow through with Obama’s and Eric Holder’s plan to federalize local law enforcement**.

There is only one thing more frightening than no police at all . . . and that’s having your local police recruited, trained and managed by Deep State bureaucrats in Washington.

**Frankel is the biggest advocate of this bill and as the mentor to “the Squad” she’s pushing it through with the help of AOC, Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib.**
The bill will not pass the Senate this year intact, but if Frankel is in office in 2021, you can bet that this bill will be reintroduced.

In the meantime, Democrat leaders led by New York’s Andrew Cuomo are already moving ahead with their own schemes to defund law enforcement. Cuomo vowed to defund police departments that didn’t “reinvent” themselves.

In 16 cities including Baltimore, LA, Seattle, Dallas, Chicago and even Durham, local governments are “divesting” from police – slashing hundreds of millions of dollars from budgets.

Their design is to turn the streets over to the criminals.

[**Help me stop that from happening. Donate today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb)
Only 141 days remain until the election and 65 days until my primary.

**We’re under pressure to match Lois Frankel’s $1.2 million dollar war chest by the primary!**

This week, we need to raise $19,000 to get on track!

[Will you help us meet this goal?](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb)

Patriot, we need 513 patriots to chip in at least $37 to hit the goal by Friday. [**Will you help make that happen?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb)

**Let’s retire Lois Frankel and send her Anti-American “Squad” scrambling the moment I’m sworn into Congress.**

[**Please support my campaign today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Sincerely,

Laura Loomer

P.S. We have until Monday to hit our fundraising goal of $19,000. Whatever you can donate will chip away at that goal and help get me to Washington. [**Thank you again and please donate today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb) [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379914-894993-5043547-47cf0fb60f-5734f9eccb)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: RESCHEDULED Day of Action with VIP Guest Kimberly Guilfoyle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Dear Friend, Our rally with Trump Senior Advisor Kimberly Guilfoyle has been moved to _**TOMORROW - Tuesday, June 16th at 5:30 pm.**_ Please join me, NYGOP State Chairman Nick Langworthy, _**and our VIP guest - Senior Advisor to the Trump 2020 Campaign - Kimberly Guilfoyle TOMORROW at 5:30 PM EST.**_ _**[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/muXctkedD6vnmXQ763E3uIBg/bUKTrsEz2PjfUQKiqVTzzg)**_ _****_ With the election less than two weeks away, we are calling on all volunteers to help our campaign contact voters all across NY27 and tell them _**Chris Jacobs has our President 's full support and endorsement for the Primary and Special Election on June 23rd. **_ The elections on June 23rd are critical to ensuring that we get strong, conservative, and experienced leadership for Western New York in Congress, and **the President and I need your help.** Join us for an exciting night on Tuesday and reserve your chance to hear from both NYGOP State Chairman Nick Langworthy and _**Trump 2020 Senior Campaign Advisor Kimberly Guilfoyle!**_ This is all hands-on deck, and your support will make sure we bring in two big wins on June 23rd. **Please RSVP by TUESDAY, June 16th, at 2:00 PM EST.** [You can RSVP online now by clicking here.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/kQZsyoltomLGLnJEpcK9Yw/bUKTrsEz2PjfUQKiqVTzzg) Whether you're an experienced campaigner or looking to get started, please join us! _**All are welcome and comprehensive training will be provided. **_

I look forward to seeing you TOMORROW and thank you for your continued support!

Best,
Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/epQefvIVJjsd8928921763x763hYbA/bUKTrsEz2PjfUQKiqVTzzg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/I78Wc6w0QbnR58AMuA2TLQ/bUKTrsEz2PjfUQKiqVTzzg)
* * *
5501 Camp Road
P.O. Box 893

subject: The Media Said Trump Didn’t Have a COVID Testing Strategy. The Media Was Wrong.
body:
The story of how the country went from nothing to more than half-a-million COVID tests on some days is a tale of inspired private–public cooperation. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39988143b6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# The Media Said Trump Didn’t Have a COVID Testing Strategy. The Media Was Wrong.

“The story of how the country went from nothing to more than half-a-million COVID tests on some days is a tale of inspired private–public cooperation,” Rich Lowry writes for _National Review_.

“The media often insisted that there was no testing plan, simply because the plan wasn’t centralized enough, a line of attack pursued by Democrats as well.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e120355dc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “It's quite clear that City of Seattle elected officials are lacking the political will to enforce the rule of law. And this is the closest I've seen since being a 20-year professional in public safety service of our country becoming a lawless state,” Seattle Police Officers Guild President Mike Solan warns. Read more from Sam Dorman in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a7367a220&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Endless lockdowns hurt small businesses—and they may hit minority-owned businesses the hardest. “From February to April, the number of active black business owners fell 41% . . . If Covid-19 cases keep rising in the weeks to come, city and state leaders might reimpose a strict lockdown. They should bear in mind who’d be harmed most by the ensuing economic destruction,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7be7882237&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Whether ‘Defund the Police’ actually means dismantling police departments, as it appears to in Minneapolis, or is an attempt to gaslight conservatives while neutering law enforcement, one thing is certain: The party yelling to ‘defund the police’ is the same one that desperately wants to disarm the citizenry,” Kylee Zempel writes for [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90bffb4eb2&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17879208/209705983/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc0OGQ2YS00M2FmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AMhZpSXdhFmZCEbT_ws6oUNu5744BAeqJU8UiKJAJ_8=)**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: A once-in-a-generation opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

If we are not impotent in the face of so much injustice... if we have a
responsibility and a role to play in saving this country... if we are
indeed the sum of our actions... then what we do, or fail to do, in these
crucial months before the November election will define us and this
country forever.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42584?refcode=ema20200615-93886&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=93886%2E444211%2ENixm8N ]That’s why Powered by People volunteers are giving so much of their
waking lives to the work of serving and winning Texas. Can you contribute
now to help fund our work?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42584?refcode=ema20200615-93886&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=93886%2E444211%2ENixm8N ]Contribute

Before Covid-19, we organized thousands of volunteers to knock on over
41,000 doors in one state house district alone, helping to produce the
largest voter turnout in a representative district special election in
Texas history.

Then, as the pandemic hit and Texans lost their jobs in record numbers, we
rushed assistance to our state’s food banks, with our volunteers filling
more than 14,000 shift hours and raising more than $200,000 for food banks
from over 36,700 contributors.

And because the upcoming elections are the most important of our lives and
we want to bring as many of our fellow Texans into the fight as possible,
last month we launched a major state-wide voter registration effort. So
far, our volunteers have followed up on hundreds of thousands of mailed
voter registration forms by making over 650,000 phone calls and sending
more than 505,000 texts to unregistered likely Democrats in Texas, helping
them to get registered.

Why?

Because the battle before us is the biggest we’ve ever fought. And so is
the prize.

In Texas alone, if we pick up nine seats we will win a majority in the
State House, one that will fight to end decades of racial gerrymandering
and black and brown voter suppression, and move forward on the most
important challenges facing us.

There is also this: a once-in-a-generation opportunity to deliver our
state’s 38 electoral college votes to the Democratic nominee for president
(which hasn’t happened since 1976). That would mean a resounding defeat
for Donald Trump, a crystal clear victory for Joe Biden and a seismic
moment in American politics that would change forever what is politically
possible in our country.

Not just nice, but necessary. Because, if there was any confusion about it
before Covid, or the massive economic contraction that has followed, or
the brutal public murders of unarmed black men and women by police, or the
most recent actions of the most lawless and immoral President to ever hold
the office... then it should now be clear that this country is on the edge
of the end, and unless we quickly, urgently steer a new course, through
new leadership, we will not make it.

The only way to achieve what is necessary in our democracy is to win
elections. And the only way to win them is by doing the tough, grinding,
relentless work of identifying, registering, canvassing and turning out
the voters of this state.

Powered by People exists solely for this purpose.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42584?refcode=ema20200615-93886&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=93886%2E444211%2ENixm8N ]With your help, we will continue to raise, organize and deploy the many
thousands of volunteers necessary to do this work. To win elections, to
ensure that power truly rests with the people, to give this, and far more
importantly, future generations a chance to survive and transcend our past
choices.

I strongly believe that this moment will either mark the end of, or a new
beginning for, this country. Our present choice to make.

We in Powered by People will continue to choose to do this important work.
I am grateful that you have chosen to support us and make it possible.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42584?refcode=ema20200615-93886&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=93886%2E444211%2ENixm8N ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=93886%2E444211%2ENixm8N

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

---
Arkansas Senator Tom Cotton, who called for militarizing our streets, just endorsed our opponent Bill Hagerty.
Recently, Tom Cotton made national news earlier this month, calling on the president to militarize our civilian streets to silence the legal and peaceful protests against systemic racism. Like the rubber stamp he is, Bill Hagerty immediately parroted his support for this extreme escalation -- and was rewarded for doing so as Tom Cotton is headlining a fundraiser for him** today**.
James is a combat veteran, and he knows the full force of the United States Military has no place on civilian streets -- especially not to keep American citizens from expressing the Constitutional rights that James fought to defend.
[_**We need supporters like you to fight back against militant Washington insiders like Tom Cotton and to keep another extremist ally like Bill Hagerty from joining their ranks in the Senate. If you can, chip in right now.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12d/18d6a294/4caa831d/26d7fa5d/427804927/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA2MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200615?refcode=jme200615_m_other&refcode2=107423")
| | [CHIP IN $5 DOLLARS TODAY >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa12d/18d6a294/4caa831d/26d7fa5d/427804927/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA2MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200615?refcode=jme200615_m_other&refcode2=107423")

Team,
We're less than 150 days away from Election Day this November. But here in Texas, we're a month away from one of the most critical primaries in the state.
People First candidate **Candace Valenzuela** is in a tight election for Texas's 24th Congressional District, and she's counting on our support to help her cross the finish line in July.
**[That's why I want to invite you to People First Future's first grassroots fundraiser tomorrow at 6:00 pm CT/7:00 pm ET with special guests Candace Valenzuela and ‘One Day At a Time' actress Justina Machado.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17879972/209724940/-1754580679?refcode=em20200615-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFjYTU4Yy00YWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eOXs3QU9ISXFMLguOKytXaYZXyIoStARCufLT4lemhI=)**
[RSVP here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17879973/209724941/-1754580679?refcode=em20200615-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFjYTU4Yy00YWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eOXs3QU9ISXFMLguOKytXaYZXyIoStARCufLT4lemhI=)
Like Candace, Justina Machado knows the importance of having courageous leaders who will tackle the tough issues. As the central character on Netflix's One Day At a Time, Justina highlights the experience of immigrant families living in the U.S., and addresses issues like immigration, racism, and LGBTQ rights.
She's lending her voice to People First Future's first-ever grassroots fundraiser to support candidates like Candace who will fight for better health care for our families, a good education for our children, and commonsense reform to our immigration system.
Candace is ready to take on the tough issues facing Texans because she's lived them herself. She overcame incredible odds, experiencing homelessness and poverty at a young age. But with the support of a good education, Candace became an educator, mother, and champion for her community.
**[We're counting on your support to help get her elected. With only a month away from the Texas primary, will you join me, Justina Machado, and Candace Valenzuela tomorrow for our grassroots fundraiser?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17879974/209724942/-1754580679?refcode=em20200615-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFjYTU4Yy00YWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eOXs3QU9ISXFMLguOKytXaYZXyIoStARCufLT4lemhI=)**
We're so excited by the chance to turn Texas blue this November. Electing Candace and other People First candidates will help us get there.
See you tomorrow,
Julián
[RSVP here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17879975/209724943/-1754580679?refcode=em20200615-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFjYTU4Yy00YWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eOXs3QU9ISXFMLguOKytXaYZXyIoStARCufLT4lemhI=)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Criswell Wins! Court Orders Jackson Never to Restrict Open Carry Rights Again
body:
Criswell Wins! Court Orders Jackson Never to Restrict Open Carry Rights Again
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/4ag5ufUdOrnb3pjNXtRhujf7r7rfTFkOvBpWVP6xAVjUct3u27O6Z3fRqVh9-1yntqDmnfENwEzYjYON9zSF-tB4UJu7Y70OmZGcLnw0mcVpHYF2y45GrFPZg8Yk_oiGnXYDVl3Dd3nyHjpkmnMFU1RFoGn5KG_TBxmXPmnVq3J8Q1SOdNh-N8IkCnHcrAmuqA0H6bC1s7q3NBv7bpraE0jN4SSgcgzkV64MGRlECJp3oNAbxmKK_qkKla-C6B84p10)
---
| | | |
---
**Criswell Wins! Court Orders Jackson Never to Restrict Open Carry Rights Again**
| |
---
| | | |
---
On Friday, a federal court ordered the City of Jackson to never again act on its own to restrict the right to openly carry a firearm. The Order was issued as a Consent Decree after the Mississippi Justice Institute (“MJI”), a non-profit constitutional litigation center and the legal arm of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, filed a lawsuit against the City and Jackson Mayor Chokwe Antar Lumumba on behalf of State Rep. Dana Criswell. The lawsuit challenged the legality of an executive order from Mayor Lumumba attempting to temporarily ban the open carry of firearms because of the coronavirus pandemic. Mayor Lumumba allowed his open carry ban to expire on April 30, 2020, three days after the lawsuit was filed. The court’s Order prevents such bans in the future and was agreed to by the parties involved in the lawsuit. “We are very happy with the outcome of this case,” said MJI director Aaron Rice. “No mayor or other elected official in Jackson will ever again be able to act on their own to take away the right to openly carry a firearm in the City of Jackson, for any reason. We hope city officials can find a way to effectively address violent crime in Jackson, but they must do so in a way that respects the right of individuals to protect themselves.” Under the Consent Decree, the City cannot take any action that would directly or indirectly prohibit, restrict, or inhibit the open carry of firearms in the City unless Mississippi’s statutes and constitutional law are first changed to allow for that. “I am very glad to know that this will never happen again in the future,” said Criswell. “Mississippians should be able to protect themselves no matter what city they are in.” “I am pleased at the result in this case,” said MJI volunteer attorney Sterling Kidd. “I greatly appreciate the opportunity serve as co-counsel in protecting and vindicating this fundamental right.” The Consent Decree was issued by Chief U.S. District Judge Daniel P. Jordan III in U.S. District Court of the Southern District of Mississippi on June 12, 2020. It went into effect immediately.
| |
---

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Happy Pride Month 🌈
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
We've had an exciting month, but if we're going to keep building on our momentum we can't afford to fall short of our goal.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Happy Pride month, friends!

I am a proud supporter of the LGBTQ+ community. Whether it’s a friend, family member, or constituent who has come out to me, I have found that the most valuable thing I can offer is the room to be themselves. Sometimes that means opening up my home, and sometimes that means opening up my heart, but no matter who they are or where they come from it is important to me that they know I support them.

Every June we take time to recognize and celebrate the achievements and contributions of the LGBTQ+ community. Since the Stonewall riots in 1969 and the first Pride marches in 1970, we’ve made tremendous progress towards equality in Kansas and across the country.

Governor Laura Kelly reinstated protections for members of our LGBTQ+ community in the workplace, and cities across Kansas have enacted their own non-discrimination ordinances -- including the City of Topeka, where I proudly serve as mayor.

Today’s ruling by the Supreme Court confirms what we know in our hearts, love is love. We must each find a way to support the LGBTQ+ individuals in our lives as well as the larger LGBTQ+ community as a whole.

Even with this progress, it's clear we still have a long way to go. Kansas is one of 27 states that lacks statewide protections against discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity in employment, housing, and public accommodations. This is unacceptable and it's past time we took action.

I will always stand with the LGBTQ+ community, and will continue to fight in Congress to ensure equality is guaranteed for all. I hope you'll join me in this important fight.

Thanks,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17880592/209740010/-265194322?gpsid=8_122_13451&refcode=em20_200615_pride_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200615_pride_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjVhNDkyNC01MGFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnowbQZatAmyXX8vp8Vwe0a5oQfHb-7COPVtpPSOuzg=)

Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

I hope you'll join me in this important fight. Thanks, Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/638285e3dd76/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, Team! There is really no stopping you guys! You’ve made such impressive progress so far this month! Take a look:
* **NEW GOAL!** We are trying to fill Soldier Field with voters we called by the end of the summer! So far we’re off to a strong start! You were able to connect with **4,800** people in the 16th district on the phone this week.

Let’s keep up the good work these next few days!
* **MVP** of the week award goes to: Haley M. who made almost 600 of those calls alone!
* Some things to look forward to:
* ## JUNE 16TH: Digital Fundraiser for Dani Brzozowski with Senator Melinda Bush: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melindadani](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f134a401f0&e=140a9b81e7)
* Join in for a conversation about the experience of Dani Brzozowski--a proud feminist running against anti-choice, anti-women, pro-Trump conservative Republican Adam Kinzinger.
* **JUNE 18TH: Trivia Night:** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/triviadani](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=199cf1609a&e=140a9b81e7)
* Gather your friends and family and make a team of up to 6 people to tackle a fun night of Trivia!
* **Later this month... **
* Get excited for a **VIRTUAL PRIDE EVENT!!!:** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/danipride](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=747a848829&e=140a9b81e7)
* This year marks the 50th anniversary of Pride parades, and though we can’t all gather safely in the streets with glitter and beads, we are bringing you Pride at home! Join us for an epic night of performances, demonstrations, and Pride fun!

A few reminders:
* **ITS SUMMER & ITS TIME TO PARTY!:** If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, and all you need to do is sit back with your happy hour drink of choice and invite your friends to do the same!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, CALL YOUR FRIENDS! Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Keelan R. _Remember the axiom, it takes a person to be told 5 times about the product/service before they are ready to be sold. Dani is new to many people. We are only one avenue to introduce them to her by answering questions and referring them to her website. _
Kathy Tall
Deputy Field Director
---

# First Fundraising Deadline of the General
This campaign's entire focus has been advocating and fighting for Montanans. Holding bad actors accountable and creating an environment where businesses can thrive.

Tonight is our first fundraising deadline of the general election and we need to have a strong showing.

Help us keep up our momentum by donating now.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=04c4a9abb3&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")
---
| Montana voters were loud and clear last week. Not only did Troy beat his primary opponents, but also received nearly 125% of the votes the Dem nominee received. This is a clear indication that Montanans don't subscribe to the big-government liberal agenda.

Troy will streamline regulations, Democrats want to grow the bureaucracy. They are working hard to turn Montana into a blue state that is pro-bureaucrat not pro-business and pro-Montanan. They want nothing more than to take a state that President Trump won by double digits and make it a bastion of liberal idealism.

Please help elect Montana conservatives. Help us tell the Democrat elites that Montana is still about small government and freedom! We are a pro-2nd Amendment state, we believe that free markets are the only path to prosperity, and that businesses succeed in spite of, rather than because of bureaucrats and regulations.

Anything helps. If you can, please donate before midnight tonight.
---

name: Terry Neese
subject: We need to support our police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, I was disappointed, but not surprised, to see our current Congresswoman Kendra Horn protesting against our police this weekend. **Once again, Kendra has chosen to stand with the radical left instead of her own district, and shown just how out of touch she really is with us.** [If you agree our district deserves a Congresswoman who will support our police and stand up for law and order, will you please take a moment to donate to our campaign right now?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Efe0UcnKMeaQoOa5qjAV7A/26csFXS2kZdQL1nhVrZJnw) If Kendra had spoken with her constituents beforehand, she would know the vast majority of us stand firmly behind the men and women who protect our communities. **As your next Congresswoman, I will proudly stand with the people of this district and our President Donald Trump in supporting law enforcement. ** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Efe0UcnKMeaQoOa5qjAV7A/26csFXS2kZdQL1nhVrZJnw) The attacks on our police and lawlessness we have seen in American cities over the last several weeks has been absolutely unacceptable. **Conservatives must take back the House this November and help President Trump restore law and order to our nation. ** [By chipping in $5, $10, or $25 today, you can help ensure we have the resources we need to take on Kendra Horn this November and restore conservative leadership to our district.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Efe0UcnKMeaQoOa5qjAV7A/26csFXS2kZdQL1nhVrZJnw) Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Terry Neese
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/nMJM8D763763n6Dw6xC9iZ763SgA/26csFXS2kZdQL1nhVrZJnw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/I59nbsCWT7638nRqkQ6fU0kg/26csFXS2kZdQL1nhVrZJnw)

P.O. Box 12744
Oklahoma City, OK 73157 Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/unsubscribe/Fc6SuitAsKVu8aWro763aKJJCNQw2PIOEJddCxdm6OxFg/baZWteB5n2ZUx9YJTk9kqQ/26csFXS2kZdQL1nhVrZJnw)

name: Congressman Al Green

body:
Please join

Congressman Al Green

For a virtual discussion with
Martin Luther King, III

Wednesday, June 24 2020
4:00 to 5:00PM Central

This event is the first of a three-part series on race relations and criminal justice reform in the United States. The funds raised at these events will be used for the 2020 General Election.

Contribution Levels:
Patron $1,500 Host $1,000 Sponsor $500 Friend $100

Attend all three events for $2,800

Video call details will be provided to all confirmed guests prior to the event.

Keep Al Green in Congress

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: The difference vote-by-mail would make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
**With only 5 months until November 's election, we must secure a universal vote-by-mail option _now._ **
What difference would vote-by-mail make? It would allow Americans to vote _without_ jeopardizing their health. COVID-19 will almost certainly be a factor in November. Crowded polling places could pose a risk to older and immunocompromised people.
That's why Congress must act _now _to ensure every American has the option to vote-by-mail this November. **[Will you stand with me by signing on?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xi702RCyVTxfnKOOovDWk2yJ0cnlnZCzQFYg7VG2fI=/A_vq5lCIe6oxjguvz61cdxADqKe7SHMqMv-754G1wJE=?source=Sanchez&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/VBM-Option-Sanchez-AB)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xi702RCyVTxfnKOOovDWk2yJ0cnlnZCzQFYg7VG2fI=/0K6zTmk3M7ikLIvgX9eYP564xoJ23P-EO4YtD7qCwZc=?source=Sanchez&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/VBM-Option-Sanchez-AB)
Last week, voters in Georgia had to wait in line for _hours _at polling stations. If we don't demand a universal vote-by-mail option for the November election, we might witness similar tactics of voter suppression nationwide.
That's why it's critical we ensure every voter can exercise their democratic right _without_ jeopardizing their health and _without_ waiting in line for hours.
[**Demand a universal vote-by-mail option | SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xi702RCyVTxfnKOOovDWk2yJ0cnlnZCzQFYg7VG2fI=/A_vq5lCIe6oxjguvz61cdxADqKe7SHMqMv-754G1wJE=?source=Sanchez&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/VBM-Option-Sanchez-AB)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xi702RCyVTxfnKOOovDWk2yJ0cnlnZCzQFYg7VG2fI=/0K6zTmk3M7ikLIvgX9eYP564xoJ23P-EO4YtD7qCwZc=?source=Sanchez&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/VBM-Option-Sanchez-AB)

Thank you,
\--_Linda S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xi702RCyVTxfnKOOovDWk2yJ0cnlnZCzQFYg7VG2fI=/Fv6XeNi3qR3bt21vV__wteKPvwafq58IwKW4NnJXwIU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xi702RCyVTxfnKOOovDWk2yJ0cnlnZCzQFYg7VG2fI=/jp_1cj-mhIzxPI6tPB87YSIStM2Tmu9za_tzskV5v50=)

subject: A huge victory for LGBTQ rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17881947/209770918/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE4YTI3Yi01ZWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ML5D1qSkVmq7HJh8JeMg82GjNhR6nK8Dd0QsjFNyM10=&emci=3f18a27b-5eaf-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=4018a27b-5eaf-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)
GREAT news to kick off the week, friend.

**The Supreme Court just ruled that under federal law, employers can no longer fire or discriminate against workers for being LGBTQ.**

It’s hard to understate how big this is in the fight for equality. Yesterday, it was legal to fire employees for being LGBTQ in 27 states. Under today’s landmark ruling -- it’s now illegal in all 50.

This is an historic win, but there’s still a lot of work to do:

**Last week, the Trump Administration revoked nondiscrimination protections for LGBTQ people in health care and health insurance. This ruling doesn't change that. But, the Equality Act -- which is still sitting on Mitch McConnell’s desk -- would put an end to all LGBTQ discrimination.**

We need to continue our work, and one big way to do that is by electing the most LGTBQ Congress in history. And that starts in CA-53 by electing Georgette Gómez.

**[Tonight is our mid-month deadline and we’re falling short of our goal. Can we count on you to contribute $3 to elect Georgette so we can make history for LGTBQ equality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17881948/209770919/1147193815?refcode=em-06152020-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE4YTI3Yi01ZWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ML5D1qSkVmq7HJh8JeMg82GjNhR6nK8Dd0QsjFNyM10=)**

Thanks for your support!

_Team Gómez_ **Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. Will you pitch now to help her continue fighting for us?**
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17881949/209770920/1147193815?refcode=em-06152020-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE4YTI3Yi01ZWFmLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ML5D1qSkVmq7HJh8JeMg82GjNhR6nK8Dd0QsjFNyM10=)

Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: PETITION: Support our police officers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Abolish the police? The police are what stand between civilization and anarchy. These calls to defund the police and disband police forces are being pushed by far-left radicals. That’s why I introduced a resolution opposing recent calls to defund the police. Chuck Schumer blocked my resolution on the Senate Floor that would have supported law enforcement. That is how radical the Democrats have become.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42733600&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MzM2MDAS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

The radical left is demanding we defund police or even disband police forces in major cities all across the country.

I truly cannot believe that we are discussing such an absurd proposal.

But look at the dangerous op-ed the woke New York Times recently published:
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MzM2MDAS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
Abolish the police? The police are what stand between civilization and anarchy. These calls to defund the police and disband police forces are being pushed by far-left radicals.

That’s why I introduced a resolution opposing recent calls to defund the police.

Chuck Schumer blocked my resolution on the Senate Floor that would have supported law enforcement.

That is how radical the Democrats have become.

Sadly, these ideas are no longer just held by the fringe left. Mayors and elected democrats all across the country are coming out in support of the movement to defund the police.

I stand with our brave men and women in law enforcement and I hope you sign my petition to support funding the police. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MzM2MDAS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MzM2MDAS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
Peter, this started with the wrongful death of George Floyd.

And then peaceful protests hijacked by mass unrest, resulting in more death and destruction.

There's no debate on protecting the right to peacefully protest. But our society needs a functional police force to maintain order.
Sign my petition to Support Funding the Police. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MzM2MDAS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
These radical ideas must be stopped, and we need to focus on returning order to our cities.

I stand with our brave men and women in law enforcement and I hope you sign my petition to support funding the police. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MzM2MDAS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
In service, Tom Cotton
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3MzM2MDAS1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTMyMzA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202
