name: Mondaire Jones
subject: A huge victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
This morning, I was heartened to see the Supreme Court interpret Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ people to live free from workplace discrimination. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UQzeaGtziLKZjpZ3p0SjKPXMLpE1U3VeWzBAcqh4oPhBTwawUCBNnedu5PVFGeVdGVGowtpfRZkEsvktLATFgkCJ6zXkD9YI8LNGp58iw8h3CdoXlFk-oGb-eiZFzGQYtGyHF-tm074hg3mQAjQrP4jAdhZIEozu3Nj09D-e43s6bOfjBpuVmS-uZDOxfVwBUhZTWcn6jfmpEF_xB-zsji-X5QiGY-fQ1E2yYFCdEpdpZXGsX-AIfZnDcYv3ktoWo/32n/QVuKTX10QQernuHNEjZnFw/h0/RLFDBjCyDAk2QIvkdGSMuyLfKP7SLQvRjxT1BEiHxwM) Friend,
This morning, I was heartened to see the Supreme Court interpret Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ people to live free from workplace discrimination.
As someone who is gay, I already knew it was immoral to fire people like me simply because of who we love. Now, the Supreme Court says it is illegal. But the civil rights of tens of millions of people should not depend on the Supreme Court interpreting a law passed in 1964. We need to pass the Equality Act, which would explicitly add protections for the LGBTQ+ community to federal anti-discrimination law.
**_[That starts with electing more LGBTQ+ leaders to Congress. Can you chip in today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UQzeaGtziLKZjpZ3p0SjKPan0lB8NKLN0plq48tfiAXvWcurii6Kv6VhjS4y3tvjuwnDSGMdVqh08kwXRgUa2egSX8fncfBLPbBUvkUpik_vhVKLceHNdLaJBpmGex0hqbW6X5CRvbAduESufFf5ADgiyKKwLqa_eNGf4sw19G7ZFmf9LuIOlsN9j6RxhfolgE4URJRuVrd01AJiBl80s3l5RlqHkH-URwuMTlcjoOXXICiKdvFBmZ3HugXXAR76k/32n/QVuKTX10QQernuHNEjZnFw/h1/ko8cI4tPTq0l-p-kYyPoCIHdGWOT3a-hIQeUC-JJJYc)_**
From the beginning of this campaign, I have said that for me, policy is personal. That this outcome was even in question is the best evidence for why we need more LGBTQ+ people in Congress -- because we will fight for our community like our lives depend on it.
If we had more LGBTQ+ leaders, we would have already passed the Equality Act, which explicitly bans anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination in areas like employment, housing, and education.
If we had more LGBTQ+ leaders, we would pass Medicare for All, so that no one has to forgo diagnostic testing or life-saving drugs like PrEP because they cannot afford premiums, deductibles, or copays.
If we had more LGBTQ+ leaders, we would pass bills that provide for comprehensive housing affordability so that LGBTQ+ youth, who disproportionately experience homelessness, have a guaranteed roof over their heads, even when their families disown them.
**_[We have an opportunity to elect someone who will fight for LGBTQ+ people. Chip in to support me today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UQzeaGtziLKZjpZ3p0SjKPeGNQYG7bh_9JHCRUQoTAi-Cw0Sv2TL36tfR_tVWCdS6LLXoZPdFgznPi7p0J1VDcY4JpF7M3ELemvyNxmz_62vdxDFVFbrq-TpsNzFMTwiUsEOTRyO_YIXKz67So7LFA18Y-BiFOn2UblKjxc9LPZ6BBFEz8dalGni0MTMXbZxYOd7A4Kq7EVtUNd4wG_kLXIuN_UNsUMMASoriU18HE1jS4eJgKfPZYv5LK8Hj6bZ3/32n/QVuKTX10QQernuHNEjZnFw/h2/2uXAhh6bin3BXtzwhX0G6R0Q-TUsObY3YapizckuVzg)_**
Our work to realize LGBTQ+ equity and justice is not done. But today, we celebrate.
Happy Pride Month, Mondaire

[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiIehPqLp50aR83p0fofD_ekhRhBB1VQa7ebqL9x_w2EA943FmL3ISkEdgjfPosMKQVJEqgs6Ni76HXXixzu7j5KVDq2FdrugN0uvRpwfSgj99xpnVBqpS6WRCaoi14Lw_KfO_xyV-39pg2WMdtjxmTe9uop_vH-Kd7AKy-QuFvYkzjj5KPLrn1S1ei42qcXwwiS8hbzKm7ZtxktdgL7bLDw/32n/QVuKTX10QQernuHNEjZnFw/h3/BcLRBFXQCswjH4kotK6C3ZVk-O69_ximUbEqKOMG1sk) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlVeQ7MpruVa0KNw2sbNX7FaHgAq4ezIjM3urw8wX5_wJBzg3R1I6d_NIIqALgRmKgRkZu6dzRxahB-oSnIJ1hpv6zrlNCd5pBBEObcRu0EdnR0uzO9bKKJGItWvLzJKcYPWSKGu9DH_Y39fF3SHnGjfwBbWkYfbkbjDjFb3tG92i4140fPVvg-CPJlM4AHpM5QMgXruLayIg1b63hoHtvE/32n/QVuKTX10QQernuHNEjZnFw/h4/2CasSiHHnavTBZr1VjGThGoqu0VU3ZZ2rXgsmaa4pNA) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7SChrnF8iSfFHczcmiKgbnUiZTIuIxpNGkY3s5ZiTcVqHL_NxZnSk8RiRdn01xRk79SqpT3Sur-8HSSFShA6Cef-a67eUrQ3t-9nWnIh-vub2S3yJ6vYR7_RTHGfQ6g4CTdRniyhL6enmBVyXgckd3Pa_JeEPLLHHwcrFsbmXtAEEAQErDN3WxPBJnTDm0xyFwM9dEU8pateJ5xtS0PqomP/32n/QVuKTX10QQernuHNEjZnFw/h5/pSKkMf3Xc4YD2AKnsOaqdxoBuubF0G7d2xkkzTVXKYM)
_Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
Mondaire for Congress
P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960

To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please [click here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GHaO50u2WIkucmjxFF0f0-6ubryMyGV7ibC_okzuFmH_O9oLZNHriXiDJwxbKYdRlwJcAQVtojtRmyjwLmSaJj4zglJ07lY-UoAY1racJ4rj5DpiaVm4uqsgxrj737Ia2JfgKnhqWXtLRv9MF3E-PEUvFl-9IOd52Th1oHkSiItuEpxVZ4zjJnakCce_ia6DV/32n/QVuKTX10QQernuHNEjZnFw/h7/JaXXLY3NMh6vF8Ba-RaFm_DEm7PuPJgMuPtIqbMA21c).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Donald Trump *and* Fox News are lying about Washington state (again)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is what I warned you about last week.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/1?t=3&akid=8065%2E868730%2EutZC0J) Friend, It happened again. After I emailed you sharing Donald Trump's attacks on me via Twitter, he doubled down with another disgraceful tweet. And now, he's cheering on his cronies at Fox News as they doctor photos of peaceful protests in Seattle, showing violence and chaos. [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8754?t=4&akid=8065%2E868730%2EutZC0J) Donald Trump is once again sowing lies to incite violence when he should be stepping up to show leadership. But why would this moment be any different than the 1,242 days since he took office? **I have a message for him, and I hope you'll join me in sending it: President Trump, it is you who should be ashamed.** Americans are hurting right now because of your absolute absence of leadership, time and time again, from failing to protect us against COVID-19 to using racist dog whistles to divide Americans across the country. Americans are in the streets because they're angry -- in large part, angry at _you_. I said last week that this was just the start of the right-wing attacks on me and this state, and I was right -- I just didn't expect to be right quite so fast. This is why I need your support, right now: **[Will you donate $5 or more to support my re-election campaign in the face of these dangerous attacks from Donald Trump and his Fox News allies?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8754?t=5&akid=8065%2E868730%2EutZC0J) Every dollar is an investment in exactly the kind of steady, thoughtful leadership they hate so much -- and that this country and state need so badly.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8755?t=6&akid=8065%2E868730%2EutZC0J)

clean_body: This is what I warned you about last week. | Friend, It happened again. After I emailed you sharing Donald Trump's attacks on me via Twitter, he doubled down with another disgraceful tweet. And now, he's cheering on his cronies at Fox News as they doctor photos of peaceful protests in Seattle, showing violence and chaos. Donald Trump is once again sowing lies to incite violence when he should be stepping up to show leadership. But why would this moment be any different than the 1,242 days since he took office? I have a message for him, and I hope you'll join me in sending it: President Trump, it is you who should be ashamed. Americans are hurting right now because of your absolute absence of leadership, time and time again, from failing to protect us against COVID-19 to using racist dog whistles to divide Americans across the country. Americans are in the streets because they're angry -- in large part, angry at you. I said last week that this was just the start of the right-wing attacks on me and this state, and I was right -- I just didn't expect to be right quite so fast. This is why I need your support, right now: Every dollar is an investment in exactly the kind of steady, thoughtful leadership they hate so much -- and that this country and state need so badly. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Very truly yours, Jay

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Reverend Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Today, I'm honored to endorse Reverend Raphael Warnock, who's ready to flip a Senate seat for Democrats in Georgia and win results for working people across the country. As a champion for fair wages, | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525768/45c30650/1c9b1c11b/66e9f949/1317651039/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We have a real chance to take back the United States Senate this year.

And Georgia's going to be a big part of it.

Today, I'm honored to endorse Reverend Raphael Warnock, who's ready to flip a Senate seat for Democrats in Georgia and win results for working people across the country.

Reverend Warnock was raised in public housing, got help from Pell Grants to get a great education, and became Senior Pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, where he preaches from the pulpit of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.

**As a champion for fair wages, Reverend Warnock has fought for working families for years. I'm proud to endorse him because with him in the Senate, Georgians will have a leader with the courage and conviction to put working people first.

[If we fight side by side, we can win this race, take back the Senate, and start making real change. So if making a financial contribution makes sense for you right now, I'm asking you to chip in. Please split a donation between Reverend Warnock's campaign and Warren Democrats today.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525768/45c30650/1c9b1c11b/66e9f948/1317651039/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLXJ3IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwOEZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNjE1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-rw?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS08F_ANN_END_E_20200615_V1S1_P")**

Reverend Warnock knows that we need to fight back against a system that's rigged to benefit the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of everyone else.

And he's in a special election against two Republican candidates -- incumbent Senator Kelly Loeffler and right-wing Congressman Doug Collins -- who are trying to out-Trump each other and prop up that rigged, corrupt system.

Kelly Loeffler, a multimillionaire, has pledged to pour $20 million from her personal fortune into her campaign. And a pro-Trump Super PAC has lined up to support Doug Collins.

But Reverend Warnock is building a grassroots-powered movement that will put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs.

Elizabeth

clean_body: Today, I'm honored to endorse Reverend Raphael Warnock, who's ready to flip a Senate seat for Democrats in Georgia and win results for working people across the country. As a champion for fair wages, | | | "" We have a real chance to take back the United States Senate this year. And Georgia's going to be a big part of it. Today, I'm honored to endorse Reverend Raphael Warnock, who's ready to flip a Senate seat for Democrats in Georgia and win results for working people across the country. Reverend Warnock was raised in public housing, got help from Pell Grants to get a great education, and became Senior Pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, where he preaches from the pulpit of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. As a champion for fair wages, Reverend Warnock has fought for working families for years. I'm proud to endorse him because with him in the Senate, Georgians will have a leader with the courage and conviction to put working people first. "" Reverend Warnock knows that we need to fight back against a system that's rigged to benefit the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of everyone else. And he's in a special election against two Republican candidates -- incumbent Senator Kelly Loeffler and right-wing Congressman Doug Collins -- who are trying to out-Trump each other and prop up that rigged, corrupt system. Kelly Loeffler, a multimillionaire, has pledged to pour $20 million from her personal fortune into her campaign. And a pro-Trump Super PAC has lined up to support Doug Collins. But Reverend Warnock is building a grassroots-powered movement that will put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Team Warner
subject: cleaner air and water AND good American jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
protecting our parks
|
---

| | Derek --

This week, the Senate is voting on the Great American Outdoors Act. This is a **huge deal.**

For nearly three years, Mark Warner has fought to get relief to national parks in the Commonwealth and across the country. Our parks have fallen into disrepair -- many haven't gotten the money they need to be maintained for _years._

That translates into more than $12 billion dollars in maintenance that needs to be done -- **with $1.1 billion of that in Virginia alone.**

Shenandoah National Park, one of the Commonwealth's natural treasures, has a backlog of over $88 million in deferred maintenance. And we're not just talking about trails and bridges -- folks in the Washington, D.C. area who commute on the G.W. Parkway know how deteriorated that road is.

**[Sign on to become a citizen co-sponsor of this important bill.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d428/53d9897e/54b9d87f/1c887f3d/3406171168/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-outdoors")**

The Great American Outdoors Act would help reduce that backlog and get folks back in our parks AND provide 100,000 jobs across the country -- including 10,000 jobs in the Commonwealth.

And that's not all. This bill also includes full, permanent funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF). This fund was established in 1964 to protect our country's natural beauty and water resources, and preserve cultural heritage sites across the country.

We have the momentum to get this done, and we're asking for your support. **[Will you sign on to be a citizen co-sponsor of the Great American Outdoors Act?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d428/53d9897e/54b9d87f/1c887f3d/3406171168/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-outdoors")**

Thank you for spreading the word.

-- Team Warner
| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d428/53d9897e/54b9d87f/1c887f3c/3406171168/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-outdoors?refcode=20200615_p_1_fl__610__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d428/53d9897e/54b9d87f/1c887f3b/3406171168/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

subject: Protests, The GOP Convention, media bias and more...
body:
Dont miss interviews with Former NYC Mayor Rudy Giuliani and Trish Regan.

http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F486fb823c138%2Fprotests-the-gop-convention-media-bias-and-more&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193 Share (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F486fb823c138%2Fprotests-the-gop-convention-media-bias-and-more&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193)
http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Protests%2C+The+GOP+Convention%2C+media+bias+and+more...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F486fb823c138%2Fprotests-the-gop-convention-media-bias-and-more Tweet (http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Protests%2C+The+GOP+Convention%2C+media+bias+and+more...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F486fb823c138%2Fprotests-the-gop-convention-media-bias-and-more)

** Protests, The GOP Convention, bias and more...
------------------------------------------------------------
I added a poll of the week question below- check it out!

We had some great segments last week on Spicer&Co. Trish Regan (https://youtu.be/OrhiMhgdIos?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) joined us to talk about the latest example of liberal media bias and the latests on the protests and riots; watch our segment with Trish here (https://youtu.be/OrhiMhgdIos?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) . Former Mayor of New York City, Rudy Giuliani (https://youtu.be/LOZ8xyrhC4I?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) talked about why reforming the police is the responsibility of the local government and interestingly the largest cities are almost entirely controlled by democrats. We ended the week with a fun segment we call "Company Quiz" (https://youtu.be/wf2_6iXd8Ms?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) - check it out see how you do against our Company did with some current event inspired trivia. Check out each of the segments on my YouTube page (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) .

I also made a video breaking down WHY some of the official business of the RNC Convention (https://youtu.be/JQtKR3s37KE?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) will remain in Charlotte, but the President will accept the nomination in Jacksonville, Florida. Check it out here (https://youtu.be/JQtKR3s37KE?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) and let me know what you think.

Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) to stay up to date on all the great segments from "Spicer&Co" and videos like the one on GOP Convention (https://youtu.be/JQtKR3s37KE?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) .

“Spicer&Co” is back every night this week at 6p and 9p on Newsmax, this week we will be joined by Lara Trump, Trish Regan and more. I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here (https://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) .

This week we have country music star Collin Raye, Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Dr. Ben Carson, Lara Trump and many others.

** Leading America
------------------------------------------------------------

In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now.

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) !

Check out this week's poll on my website -

** Police departments (and their funding/reforms) are the responsibility of local governments - is effective change going to come from local governments (mayors) or the federal government?
------------------------------------------------------------
Weigh in here (http://seanspicer.com/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) !

** Join the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer
------------------------------------------------------------

This month I've teamed up with Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193)

In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer (https://seanspicer.com/giving-back/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk was virtual. So instead you can get a Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to my team, "The Spice is Right" we've raised almost $3,000 so far, thank you! Find my team here (https://secure.pancan.org/site/TR/PurpleStride/PurpleStride?team_id=26655&pg=team&fr_id=1942&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) !

Check out Cameo here (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) and learn more about PanCan here (https://secure.pancan.org/site/TR/PurpleStride/PurpleStride?team_id=26655&pg=team&fr_id=1942&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1670866807-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_15_03_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1670866807-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Hackett?=
subject: An historic decision for the LGBTQ community.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d4708b223d&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **SCOTUS Protects Gender Identity & Sexual Orientation Against
Workplace Discrimination**
---
| Dear Friend,

Today, the Supreme Court delivered a landmark win for equality and justice in our country. In a 6-3 decision, the Court ruled that gender identity and sexual orientation are protected from workplace discrimination under Title VII of the Civil RIghts Act of 1964. Discrimination against LGBTQ persons, however, continues and is a goal of the current Administration and its supporters in Congress, including Jackie Walorski.

The decision highlights what is at stake in November. Jackie Walorski is virulently anti-LGBTQ. Pat Hackett will be the first openly LGBTQ member of Congress from Indiana and believes in Dignity and Justice for All. Unlike Jackie, Pat understands that discrimination is not a Hoosier or American value.

In 2016, Jackie offered her full support to the Russell Amendment, a horrific piece of legislation that made government funding of discrimination against LGBTQ persons under the guise of religious liberty perfectly legal. She continues to oppose the Equality Act.

[**Jackie is out of step with the goodness of the people of this District. She is harmful to LGBTQ families and proud in her support of the Pence/Trump Administration. body:
Every step of the way, Claudia has fought for families and communities [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=eb793dc6a54b4e44a39e4ee5488d798f&_e=WckxaFhCQMimhQGkQwe6tDqbxBqQenYSwiJkC77b79oXwrHsaj2G5kkVVByDUgU1ZYfysgWgSnMDNHj38FOIDETxbK9hzGhtjU6vv6MU-nrN-EBkRL8qZwX8rVUWFtLMWKziZPIxC2NYRKmmMcd71j4z1EvcVTyT8gup2DRaIRWTwHyXKInou8omEWWnJlN4BohlNK00NeLrZ2yOngBXNWfsnK5guIvtOULSNk-yaorQwRVE1j9FT2d4iR-1Dcdk6YaTmGUM7WdDlALczTMWEQ6GG8CQXhf8nyfweqQ4hZbkx3Th1piNNTuapPpIMBY4yL7s_KaLocLFWfrrmYqnw47_lxr-wss0cpTBjIs69-Gq8M73o70KucDcMq4gt-JE_bIkguk3-b84usghB1Xmea0ZMr-wMEhqcHxlPgSFZRcNA27K5bQ5A_LCMrYdsphQ9c2NneSksMlH8a1Jwuo1lHbsStTccAxDjl_s7DULjoo%3D) Friend, Americans are facing challenges on all sides right now, and we need leaders – not politicians – in Washington who understand what the average American is confronted with on a daily basis.
**Claudia’s been there. **
As a single mother who ran a small business while also providing care for her elderly mother, Claudia understands that public service needs to go deeper than politics. [**SEND THIS FIGHTER TO CONGRESS**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=eb793dc6a54b4e44a39e4ee5488d798f&_e=WckxaFhCQMimhQGkQwe6tDqbxBqQenYSwiJkC77b79oXwrHsaj2G5kkVVByDUgU1ZYfysgWgSnMDNHj38FOIDETxbK9hzGhtjU6vv6MU-nrN-EBkRL8qZwX8rVUWFtLMWKziZPIxC2NYRKmmMcd71j4z1EvcVTyT8gup2DRaIRWTwHyXKInou8omEWWnJlN4BohlNK00NeLrZ2yOngBXNWfsnK5guIvtOULSNk-yaorQwRVE1j9FT2d4iR-1Dcdk6YaTmGUM7WdDlALczTMWEeqBfEq4eqX0Xp9Ps5Sss6-VfLdi5JSyBA4oM9s6AJ3haaLSkNrh-qQlEHYgf1jN9PpN4-tHNhWjprqWn9WzZup26_tXlyDQ37GGLDvtsQfQ1GTcQCGE19ece-uDVgj_VhI-HSs-EuubVB5udTw_AgsMblhpcen87H4Zk1Vu5lDkcA7BXDbWALOLg83JmlOFfqcVpscQYxdC3dCU8D_RccE%3D) That’s the American spirit in a nutshell, if you ask us. She fought for years to support both her family and her community, and that hard work has all been worth it.
**Claudia’s son is now a Captain in the U.S. Marine Corps, and that small business still stands today.**
She didn’t stop there. After being elected to serve in the New York State Assembly, Claudia continued to defend Upstate New York families, communities, and conservative values every day.
**In fact, Claudia was recognized as the MOST conservative legislator in New York in 2012 after standing against Governor Cuomo’s efforts to dismantle our 2nd Amendment rights.** [**SEND THIS FIGHTER TO CONGRESS**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=eb793dc6a54b4e44a39e4ee5488d798f&_e=WckxaFhCQMimhQGkQwe6tDqbxBqQenYSwiJkC77b79oXwrHsaj2G5kkVVByDUgU1ZYfysgWgSnMDNHj38FOIDETxbK9hzGhtjU6vv6MU-nrN-EBkRL8qZwX8rVUWFtLMWKziZPIxC2NYRKmmMcd71j4z1EvcVTyT8gup2DRaIRWTwHyXKInou8omEWWnJlN4BohlNK00NeLrZ2yOngBXNWfsnK5guIvtOULSNk-yaorQwRVE1j9FT2d4iR-1Dcdk6YaTmGUM7WdDlALczTMWEZCj5Cyx2oFQGzbqAsygRczHEeKGpMKYnvjQjn2E7RBeCKss07-1-SYxQOtm8GYdJpHyndQPvqab5slSHa3aHSaMw51U5fXNVyvA4WhmHCTDiAZzvjBIeSr6n4LYRU3o5parvZZrkbyEI243-ePxhckrq5bSDX2ZS6W4-RIFYk8HOHtr_nwZ2A0-0NKrhFmbMzQk_hvPe5bzKJ6-IqTyP5w%3D) She didn’t stop there, either. Claudia took that same fighting conservative spirit to Washington where she helped President Trump pass historic tax cuts for families and small businesses.
Now that Anthony Brindisi – a liberal Democrat – is holding Claudia’s former seat in Congress, those families and businesses she fought to defend are seeing their taxes rise and their conservative values thrown to the wayside.
**Claudia never gave up before, and she isn’t giving up on NY-22 now. **
She’s running to fight for our families, communities, and small businesses again – but she needs your help to make it happen.
In times like these, America needs that strong, conservative leadership again. Can we count on your support in this fight, friend?
**[Chip in $5, $10, $50, or any amount – and we mean ANY amount – if you would like to send Claudia back to Congress to serve our families, communities, and small businesses again>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=eb793dc6a54b4e44a39e4ee5488d798f&_e=WckxaFhCQMimhQGkQwe6tDqbxBqQenYSwiJkC77b79oXwrHsaj2G5kkVVByDUgU1ZYfysgWgSnMDNHj38FOIDETxbK9hzGhtjU6vv6MU-nrN-EBkRL8qZwX8rVUWFtLMWKziZPIxC2NYRKmmMcd71j4z1EvcVTyT8gup2DRaIRWTwHyXKInou8omEWWnJlN4BohlNK00NeLrZ2yOngBXNWfsnK5guIvtOULSNk-yaorQwRVE1j9FT2d4iR-1Dcdk6YaTmGUM7WdDlALczTMWEXs40LXEQGMrby2tVFTqQJuGjKn61wSLPTGAVa37jOJJCgIYBBLFBDuRRxxU6iaakxIwX4192jtaAaQWj7oit4Sytu9EruTMricz9C8vZVh83-DpW3VTUbm7mI1G3n8VdLqwLWwOyQ6LRvyglA1nSZbJXmHcF1Oeb4jNVhTpT9D-Eqs2nLEI14PuvSbPArq82geh3WbWmngmWjJCP-dy9kU%3D)**
Thanks for all your support, Team Claudia Tenney |

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Summer opportunities for our kids
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last week, I announced our goal to return to full in-person learning when the next school year starts. I know that right now, August 31 feels far away for most students. But summer is just around the corner and there's still some uncertainty for parents, administrators and kids. Today, I want to address some of the things we're doing to support Rhode Island families this summer.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yqbnWrh3Bm3X_DGJntlGT7gRgQ5NRNVvlX2HpA4x5hW7JXlJt0LH1NVai08zxMhzV-CCP2o-sPXtSJhSr_J8dG9wgpQWDbY1_cqpbJv1quMZH48-lC2VR95UheF8xtoay5DHS42VaMUVEvZURJvu-HhqgBFXMJlYGGFNHJyQHLGu459qALiN6x5t3BkugYGru-wkTMxjmr0=&c=rXyvD0zS75rCugGAYOLuRq9CIgy4foJbBFFsvA99-58Z6wEAdE7reg==&ch=pznHWjFr0V_dG83pKNP7TCsQYL4B8VDyNLofRXhdPxDuNDcRlIvZvw==)
---
| Our kids have been at home doing distance learning for months. I'm so proud of how well they've done, but there's no question that distance learning is less than ideal. It's also been incredibly hard for parents--especially parents of young children who have had to either stay home or find child care so they can go to work. It's critical for both our kids' development and for our economy that we have summer programming options.
Last month, I announced that summer camps and youth programs will be allowed to operate in-person starting on June 29. I'm glad that many programs plan to open, but we know that some programs that serve some of the most economically disadvantaged kids in our state are struggling to fund the changes they'll need to make to follow our new rules.
To meet this need, we're allocating $7.5 million in CARES Act funding to provide financial support to summer camps. This is designed to help programs follow new our coronavirus rules. It will cover the cost of things like hiring new staff or bringing in a daily cleaning crew. Interested organizations should visit [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yqbnWrh3Bm3X_DGJntlGT7gRgQ5NRNVvlX2HpA4x5hW7JXlJt0LH1NVai08zxMhzSZRmj4alwQmflOzhS9OSMdCJNVf-eEIdKpD2hbPd8SWmd4t95_H1IXk7T4qS_27IOKTC9WaG8kpLxxIe_e-WpH1d5-VnnnlpdjJjKG8f78-5YBbYXzQvtvWe5z9cakeKKgPOHAxw2u1qVUvSKv6rJChUwyg9AWXKUWrlM_qI8YFgMxY0GXqkYTHH_RNMgp-32_r-tfCaebYAqSb1aN71IBGRnoQaC_eZoB3LI8At8GmVIb1MtizEPoH9c9UNde_NLAoEbto5KqrdeCF3lJUfBhMGDW8AxRX3O8V6qfqYNaFhW8lnt-vNdXgRFaFuBD80_oBm6q3t9d1ZLNxpUTse70b_rwRBtp_rxeDwKC4ZErcQ7-xWgl5psLOimB0NoN_ghL9BOkrxTr8T4JVae0ZspL0vMa8KjD4M&c=rXyvD0zS75rCugGAYOLuRq9CIgy4foJbBFFsvA99-58Z6wEAdE7reg==&ch=pznHWjFr0V_dG83pKNP7TCsQYL4B8VDyNLofRXhdPxDuNDcRlIvZvw==). to learn more and apply today. The application period is already open and applications are being approved on a rolling basis.
In addition to our existing programs, we also want to support continued virtual learning this summer. I'm excited to announce that Rhode Island public school students will have the opportunity to sign up for what we're calling 'SAIL Courses' through RIDE. SAIL is a temporary program designed to enhance educational opportunities for our students. The goal is to provide all kids, from pre-K through recent high school graduates, with fun educational opportunities from taking extra-curricular arts classes to earning academic credit.
We know that some students, particularly high school students, may need to get a summer job to help support their families or earn spending money. But we want students to be able to prioritize their academics. To help with that, some SAIL programs--particularly classes in math and English--will be offering high school students a stipend. New programs of all types are being approved daily, so if you are a student of any age interested in taking advantage of one of these opportunities, please continue to check [RIDE's website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yqbnWrh3Bm3X_DGJntlGT7gRgQ5NRNVvlX2HpA4x5hW7JXlJt0LH1NVai08zxMhzn9chvLL4WNUOK-LOMld3Uq2_UupGgQ7nkDaPeOuJkb7qfCR_3FN0N7QWIEMsK29NtlSDdpaVN8jn9sOi_Dp5Cw==&c=rXyvD0zS75rCugGAYOLuRq9CIgy4foJbBFFsvA99-58Z6wEAdE7reg==&ch=pznHWjFr0V_dG83pKNP7TCsQYL4B8VDyNLofRXhdPxDuNDcRlIvZvw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yqbnWrh3Bm3X_DGJntlGT7gRgQ5NRNVvlX2HpA4x5hW7JXlJt0LH1E5cz5MCe4t1i2xPgWsfe-y63idfVEgS3-OWXb2AKTr5tobVmLrE2gLTknrLfbgaqDe8H_CKYY89a6J0NgeAVnXKqNppfjESSjJtUk5lRl4w8nuqq9YtXGSGwRZqrPMG53SPAzGNuZPbiePblt77lag=&c=rXyvD0zS75rCugGAYOLuRq9CIgy4foJbBFFsvA99-58Z6wEAdE7reg==&ch=pznHWjFr0V_dG83pKNP7TCsQYL4B8VDyNLofRXhdPxDuNDcRlIvZvw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yqbnWrh3Bm3X_DGJntlGT7gRgQ5NRNVvlX2HpA4x5hW7JXlJt0LH1E5cz5MCe4t1i2xPgWsfe-y63idfVEgS3-OWXb2AKTr5tobVmLrE2gLTknrLfbgaqDe8H_CKYY89a6J0NgeAVnXKqNppfjESSjJtUk5lRl4w8nuqq9YtXGSGwRZqrPMG53SPAzGNuZPbiePblt77lag=&c=rXyvD0zS75rCugGAYOLuRq9CIgy4foJbBFFsvA99-58Z6wEAdE7reg==&ch=pznHWjFr0V_dG83pKNP7TCsQYL4B8VDyNLofRXhdPxDuNDcRlIvZvw==).
---
| We also know that many high school and college students need to earn money over the summer. And there's no question that finding a summer job will be more difficult this year because of the pandemic. So, we're creating the COVID-19 Response Youth Summer Jobs Program to support employers who hire Rhode Island youth for summer jobs related to our COVID response. This is being run through the Governor's Workforce Board. More information and applications for employers are available on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yqbnWrh3Bm3X_DGJntlGT7gRgQ5NRNVvlX2HpA4x5hW7JXlJt0LH1NVai08zxMhzSZRmj4alwQmflOzhS9OSMdCJNVf-eEIdKpD2hbPd8SWmd4t95_H1IXk7T4qS_27IOKTC9WaG8kpLxxIe_e-WpH1d5-VnnnlpdjJjKG8f78-5YBbYXzQvtvWe5z9cakeKKgPOHAxw2u1qVUvSKv6rJChUwyg9AWXKUWrlM_qI8YFgMxY0GXqkYTHH_RNMgp-32_r-tfCaebYAqSb1aN71IBGRnoQaC_eZoB3LI8At8GmVIb1MtizEPoH9c9UNde_NLAoEbto5KqrdeCF3lJUfBhMGDW8AxRX3O8V6qfqYNaFhW8lnt-vNdXgRFaFuBD80_oBm6q3t9d1ZLNxpUTse70b_rwRBtp_rxeDwKC4ZErcQ7-xWgl5psLOimB0NoN_ghL9BOkrxTr8T4JVae0ZspL0vMa8KjD4M&c=rXyvD0zS75rCugGAYOLuRq9CIgy4foJbBFFsvA99-58Z6wEAdE7reg==&ch=pznHWjFr0V_dG83pKNP7TCsQYL4B8VDyNLofRXhdPxDuNDcRlIvZvw==).
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Last week, I announced our goal to return to full in-person learning when the next school year starts. I know that right now, August 31 feels far away for most students. But summer is just around the corner and there's still some uncertainty for parents, administrators and kids. Today, I want to address some of the things we're doing to support Rhode Island families this summer. | == | Our kids have been at home doing distance learning for months. I'm so proud of how well they've done, but there's no question that distance learning is less than ideal. It's also been incredibly hard for parents--especially parents of young children who have had to either stay home or find child care so they can go to work. It's critical for both our kids' development and for our economy that we have summer programming options. Last month, I announced that summer camps and youth programs will be allowed to operate in-person starting on June 29. I'm glad that many programs plan to open, but we know that some programs that serve some of the most economically disadvantaged kids in our state are struggling to fund the changes they'll need to make to follow our new rules. To meet this need, we're allocating $7.5 million in CARES Act funding to provide financial support to summer camps. This is designed to help programs follow new our coronavirus rules. It will cover the cost of things like hiring new staff or bringing in a daily cleaning crew. Interested organizations should visit ==. to learn more and apply today. The application period is already open and applications are being approved on a rolling basis. In addition to our existing programs, we also want to support continued virtual learning this summer. I'm excited to announce that Rhode Island public school students will have the opportunity to sign up for what we're calling 'SAIL Courses' through RIDE. SAIL is a temporary program designed to enhance educational opportunities for our students. The goal is to provide all kids, from pre-K through recent high school graduates, with fun educational opportunities from taking extra-curricular arts classes to earning academic credit. We know that some students, particularly high school students, may need to get a summer job to help support their families or earn spending money. But we want students to be able to prioritize their academics. To help with that, some SAIL programs--particularly classes in math and English--will be offering high school students a stipend. New programs of all types are being approved daily, so if you are a student of any age interested in taking advantage of one of these opportunities, please continue to check ==. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | We also know that many high school and college students need to earn money over the summer. And there's no question that finding a summer job will be more difficult this year because of the pandemic. So, we're creating the COVID-19 Response Youth Summer Jobs Program to support employers who hire Rhode Island youth for summer jobs related to our COVID response. This is being run through the Governor's Workforce Board. More information and applications for employers are available on ==. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: we need you more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Like the lives of folks across our state, earlier this year our campaign was put on hold. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3763c2dca287415f802d98e104117042&_e=9uahOguoXaXQCZE7DjfxS-xQBJRZuP0V4seo5DEleK4sjQ3E634EWQ4q1CxVhE2PP7vqKCcHJC8FjTXbeRqyv5tVwKCsR_rwic2MUbU9qU250snC2r0cRk-oQ9bZyy-Q3P4X1c9nARQwKHM_5ZIo7NqgKLEIRIj1XnfZl4eEhpYEyzmBa9ZdsCmM3xW9ima0k6N4IaFceKH5VFDoDkmF0YmYZ6pmcw-xrYtWw-9QTD2l42cKG2-6A2HcjfT94ucUtWQiW9ClrxyA1ZB_ElvGAsXi9LWPo_TGDthjMHCEEYEhFD2dmeR46dAzNqMwPaJmG2nwfTDC6WFyJljAQ3U1pA_8kSIlJlrkDFia5Pt174oLRJNPzpvPVEZLJx7dx-XK_StjhLpNRwmMRm1rmRX3rQ%3D%3D) |
---|---|---
friend,

Just like the lives of folks across our state, earlier this year our campaign was put on hold.

Governor Holcomb put 100% of his energy behind fighting COVID-19. And -- like Hoosiers -- we stood behind him.

As your Holcomb Crew, we’ve been spending our time helping spread accurate and reliable information, listening to Hoosiers' concerns over the phone or online, and helping Governor Holcomb keep Hoosiers safe and healthy in any way that we can.

But Election Day 2020 is coming no matter what and like the rest of the state, we need to get back to work (safely!). If anything, the last couple of months have taught us how important it is to have a leader who is dedicated to building One Indiana.

_They’ve also taught us that Indiana needs a leader who knows how to bring high-wage, high-demand jobs to Indiana and who has done it before. That we need a leader who knows how to bring Hoosiers together. That we need a steady and experienced leader that we can trust._

**That we need another four years of Governor Holcomb.**

Our 2020 campaign will most likely look a little bit different. While Governor Holcomb and Hoosiers across the state are getting Indiana back on track, there are still many unknowns.

_But we do know that we’ll need your help more than ever. That’s why we’re reaching out today. Our end of quarter deadline is coming up later this month, and we need to pick up right where left off._

**friend, will you chip in any amount using the button below and invest in One Indiana for another four years?**
[**Invest in One Indiana**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=3763c2dca287415f802d98e104117042&_e=9uahOguoXaXQCZE7DjfxS9Pr3ZPb2mCllr-PYRlvQQ_i_DlIRKdm7EThxlgvvvT82YsqvxF62b6Vd85eaNENkK6VNtaKksFECSkLv0NODJr5SXgVn3I6-GbyJ6WiINBibCpdlWOYIEM4P_fKVqG1VGmCn1Tgy6vyIUclSXg2Ji0kcfccBcbhwtZyWMQmLOcXOmZlHF_oRY6Fb6CNqInBQthHWbxqw2rgVxhADTGQmmA9SUHT_RsRKiIKsYQhkik6xELKh5NB4MEk2SyN2962O5_oEjmzrkTDsOaAS0Q5K8-1EF531ULIb_XIuKJUSJudYy916N_fjBkh04IYZd7EcCr_eyodqz-K9SXipNzKiGjiCIJ0t_RyxMGs2JOwRINEzj9TeWApbeaxEPi_r34vHL1Ugn5itUk0vErEjH_8fAY%3D)
_We know that times are tough for a lot of Hoosiers because of COVID-19, and we don’t want you to give unless you have the means._

If you are able to give, we’d love to have your support.

Thank you for everything you do,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---

name: Finance Update (via ChristyForCongress.org)
subject: Good news, bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We have good news and bad news.

**The good news** is that we raised nearly a million dollars between April 23rd and June 1st -- and because of grassroots supporters like you, we have enough money in the bank to sustain our operations right now.

**The bad news** is that Mike Garcia outraised us and outspent us by 60%, and he still has more cash-on-hand.

And now, as we rush towards our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since the special election, we have to make sure we can compete with Garcia's cash. This is our chance to show that CA-25 is still committed to the change we won in 2018 -- and willing to fight for it.

**[That's we need to raise $15,000 by midnight TONIGHT -- but we're $5,437 short with hours left to go. We can't afford to miss this crucial goal, Peter. Can you chip in $5 right now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3689/3440617870/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f368a/3440617870/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f368b/3440617870/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3684/3440617870/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3685/3440617870/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3686/3440617870/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3689/3440617870/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full")
Mike Garcia has his special interests and dark money donors to thank for his fundraising lead -- which means that they are just a quick call away as we get closer to the election and the pressure heats up.

**Christy has you.** She doesn't take money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.

The battle for CA-25 will be tough. We don't have to match Garcia and the GOP money machine dollar-for-dollar, but we can't afford to be outraised and outspent 2-to-1.

**[It's time to step up and show that the grassroots voices speak louder than the corporate dollars. If you're with Christy, chip in $5 or more before midnight tonight and help meet our ambitious goal.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3689/3440617870/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full")**

Thank you,

Team Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3689/3440617870/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba6a/29776869/9a73fc6/569f3689/3440617870/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MTVfbW0zLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200615_mm3-full")

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: President Trump’s message to West Point’s graduating cadets
body:
President Trump delivered a commencement address on Saturday to 1,107 new officers graduating from the United States Military Academy at West Point. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a582210627&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 15, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH:** **President Trump delivers West Point commencement address **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04bd73074e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** delivered a commencement address on Saturday to 1,107 new officers graduating from the United States Military Academy at West Point.

**With ****many**** ****families and friends** unable to attend the ceremony because of social distancing guidelines, President Trump took time to recognize and celebrate the incredible accomplishments of these young men and women.

**“Few words** in the English language and few places in history have commanded as much awe and admiration as West Point,” he said, calling the Academy “a universal symbol of American gallantry, loyalty, devotion, discipline, and great skill.”

**Here are a few excerpts** from what he told the Class of 2020 cadets:

* **“Every graduate** on this field could have gone to virtually any top-ranked university that you wanted. You chose to devote your life to the defense of America.”

* **“You have come** from the farms and the cities, from states big and small, and from every race, religion, color, and creed. But when you entered these grounds, you became part of one team, one family, proudly serving one great American nation.”

* **“The survival of America** and the endurance of civilization itself depends on the men and women just like each of you. It depends on people who love their country with all their heart and energy and soul.”

* **“When it comes** to bragging rights, no one can boast louder than the class that brought Navy’s 14-year football winning streak to a screeching halt. You did that. I happened to be there.”

**The Class of 2020** cadets begin their careers at a crucial moment in U.S. history. President Trump believes the sacred duty of America’s military is to defend our country from foreign enemies, not to rebuild foreign nations. “We are not the policemen of the world,” he told the graduating class.

🎬 [President Trump: We are ending the era of endless wars](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e02a7e8f1&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ** : [President Trump’s full remarks](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef2bce9f8b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **In photos: Vice President Pence meets with faith leaders**

**Vice President Mike Pence** joined a roundtable discussion at Covenant Church of Pittsburgh on Friday, where faith and community leaders shared ways to protect equality and opportunity for every American.

**“We are going** to continue to have conversations with community leaders across the Country and listen to their insights on how we can encourage healing in our Nation,” the Vice President wrote on Twitter. “We will work every day for the safety and prosperity of every American.”

🎬 [Vice President Pence on school choice](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b561063dc&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** visited Dallas last week, where he outlined steps to address racial inequality in healthcare, resources and funding for small businesses, and education.

**“The truth** is the African-American community has been years ahead of the broader population in understanding the justice behind allowing parents to choose where their children go to school, whether it’s public, private, parochial, or religious school,” Vice President Pence said.

[PHOTOS: Vice President joins faith and community leaders in Pittsburgh](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b33e3c1465&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Members of the U.S. Military participate in a flag****-****raising**** ceremony in honor of Flag Day** | June 14, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=88e97e6859&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3e3c65f9d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d553724d08)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
